mapper.insert: insert into counselor_scoring_rule (counselor_id, rule_name, rule_code, category, weight, min_score, max_score, description, evaluation_criteria, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{counselorId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleCode}, #{category}, #{weight}, #{minScore}, #{maxScore}, #{description}, #{evaluationCriteria}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})

insert into counselor_scoring_rule (counselor_id, rule_name, rule_code, category, weight, min_score, max_score, description, evaluation_criteria, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values
(#{rule.counselorId}, #{rule.ruleName}, #{rule.ruleCode}, #{rule.category}, #{rule.weight}, #{rule.minScore}, #{rule.maxScore}, #{rule.description}, #{rule.evaluationCriteria}, #{rule.sortOrder}, #{rule.status}, #{rule.createTime}, #{rule.updateTime}, #{rule.deleted})
mapper.select: select csr.*, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from counselor_scoring_rule csr left join teacher_users tu on csr.counselor_id = tu.id where csr.id = #{id}

select csr.*, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from counselor_scoring_rule csr left join teacher_users tu on csr.counselor_id = tu.id where csr.counselor_id = #{counselorId} and csr.deleted = 0 order by csr.sort_order asc

select csr.*, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from counselor_scoring_rule csr left join teacher_users tu on csr.counselor_id = tu.id where csr.counselor_id = #{counselorId} and csr.category = #{category} and csr.deleted = 0 order by csr.sort_order asc

select csr.*, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from counselor_scoring_rule csr left join teacher_users tu on csr.counselor_id = tu.id where csr.counselor_id = #{counselorId} and csr.status = 1 and csr.deleted = 0 order by csr.sort_order asc
select distinct category from counselor_scoring_rule where counselor_id = #{counselorId} and deleted = 0 and category is not null order by category asc
mapper.update:
update counselor_scoring_rule
rule_name = #{ruleName},
rule_code = #{ruleCode},
category = #{category},
weight = #{weight},
min_score = #{minScore},
max_score = #{maxScore},
description = #{description},
evaluation_criteria = #{evaluationCriteria},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
status = #{status},
deleted = #{deleted},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update counselor_scoring_rule set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
update counselor_scoring_rule set deleted = 1 where counselor_id = #{counselorId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from counselor_scoring_rule where counselor_id = #{counselorId} and deleted = 0
